lines.english: He is Imperishable; nothing can be broken.
He Himself is All-in-Himself.
In His many ways, He establishes and disestablishes.
He lends His Support to maintain the Universe.
Unfathomable and Inscrutable is the Glory of the Lord.
As He inspires us to meditate, O Nanak, so do we meditate. ||6||
Those who know God are glorious.
God's servants cause sorrows to be forgotten.
God's servants redeem all.
The whole world is redeemed by their teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਜਪਿ ਭਏ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad jap bhe nihaal |
lines.english: Chanting the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they become ecstatic.
The Merciful Lord unites them with Himself.
He alone is committed to serve them,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਪੁਰਖ ਕਉ ਊਤਮ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak tin purakh kau aootam kar maan |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, respect those persons as the most noble. ||7||
Those who chant the Naam find their place of rest.
upon whom God bestows His Mercy, by great good fortune.
Acknowledge that Creator Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karai su prabh kai rang |
lines.english: Whatever you do, do it for the Love of God.
By its own natural course, whatever will be will be.
Forever and ever, abide with the Lord.
As He is, so does He appear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis te upaje tis maeh samaae |
lines.english: From Him we came, and into Him we shall merge again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਕੀਆ ਜਨ ਮੀਠ ਲਗਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kaa keea jan meetth lagaanaa |
lines.english: God's doings are sweet to His humble servant.
O Nanak, know that God and His humble servant are one and the same. ||8||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਸੁਖ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਉਨਹੂ ਬਨਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: oe sukh nidhaan unahoo ban aae |
lines.english: He is the treasure of peace, and so does His servant become.
Unto His own, He has given His honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਕਲਾ ਭਰਪੂਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਾਨਨਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sarab kalaa bharapoor prabh birathaa jaananahaar |
lines.english: God is totally imbued with all powers; He is the Knower of our troubles.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਉਧਰੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaa kai simaran udhareeai naanak tis balihaar |1|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on Him, we are saved; Nanak is a sacrifice to Him. ||1||
The Lord of the World is the Mender of the broken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਕੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sagal kee chintaa jis man maeh |
lines.english: The cares of all are on His Mind;
He Himself cherishes all beings.
Ashtapadee:
The Imperishable Lord God is Himself All-in-all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: re man mere sadaa har jaap |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate forever on the Lord.
no one is turned away from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਪਿ ਏਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gat naanak jap ek har naam |1|
lines.english: Salvation, O Nanak, is attained by chanting the Name of the One Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੇਰੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin naahee terai kichh kaam |
lines.english: Without Him, nothing is of any use to you.
even though the mortal may wish it so, hundreds of times.
By one's own actions, nothing is accomplished,
One who is good-looking should not be vain;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਗਲ ਘਟ ਸੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee jot sagal ghatt sohai |
lines.english: the Light of God is in all hearts.
Why should anyone be proud of being rich?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਦੀਆ ਦਰਬੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa sabh kichh tis kaa deea darabai |
lines.english: All riches are His gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਕਲਾ ਬਿਨਾ ਕਹ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee kalaa binaa keh dhaavai |
lines.english: but without God's Power, what can anyone do?
One may call himself a great hero,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਤੂਟੈ ਹਉ ਰੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis gur prasaad toottai hau rog |
lines.english: One who, by Guru's Grace, is cured of the disease of ego
the Great Giver shall judge him to be a fool.
One who brags about giving to charities

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਨਹਿ ਅਸਥੰਮਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: tiau gur kaa sabad maneh asathaman |
lines.english: so does the Guru's Word support the mind.
- O Nanak, that person is forever healthy. ||2||
As a palace is supported by its pillars,
so is the mortal saved, grasping hold of the Guru's Feet.
As a stone placed in a boat can cross over the river,
As the darkness is illuminated by the lamp,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: tiau saadhoo sang mil jot pragattaavai |
lines.english: The Company of the Holy, and one's light shines forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur darasan dekh man hoe bigaas |
lines.english: so does the mind blossom forth, beholding the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਮਹਾ ਉਦਿਆਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jiau mahaa udiaan meh maarag paavai |
lines.english: The path is found through the great wilderness by joining the Saadh Sangat,
I seek the dust of the feet of those Saints;
O foolish mind, why do you cry and bewail?
O Lord, fulfill Nanak's longing! ||3||
